title: The Unholy Four
writer: Leigh Brackett, Michael Carreras, George Sanders
actors: Paulette Goddard, William Sylvester, Patrick Holt
plot: A man on a fishing trip with three of his friends receives a blow to the head that makes him lose his memory. Three years later it all comes back to him, but on the day it does one of the men who was on the trip with him turns up ...
